description: Bug fix: Currently Zaknotes does not retry when a certain chunk comes empty from gemini at transcription and fails, stopping the workflow. I want it to retry indefinitely subject to the stanard delay when it detects that no text is extracted from a certain chunk. Make sure also it never just proceeds when a certain chunk is empty, even if the workflow is stopped, it should start from that empty chunk when restarted and not just go to the next chunk
